title: Living in Boulder Vlog 2 - 17 - 2017: Area Circles Background

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder, which included shampooing his car at his mom's house for hours. He explains the 'area circles' background used in his videos — concentric rings doubling in size starting at 500 meters, meant to give viewers a spatial sense of scale when traveling. He also vents about feeling overwhelmed trying to start too many projects simultaneously: biking, acting/a show, and his website, which has multiple unfinished pages.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Should have done it long ago; it's time-consuming but worth it
Useful tool for calibrating geographic scale; plans to make videos for each size from different world locations
Feels overwhelmed trying to start biking, acting, and website work all at once; things feel like they're falling apart
It's a mess — multiple unfinished pages; needs to be fixed before he can move forward

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Today I got up kind of early like at 8 and I think I even did a little bit of work on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I laid down again and slept until I got a lot and then I went to my mom's house and shampooed her car from noon to six.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The car was dumping out white foam constantly while I was shampooing it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't realize how dirty the car was before and it's starting to look really good now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Shampooing the car is very time-consuming, taking hours.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to continue shampooing the car until it stops producing white foam.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I must have put too much shampoo concentrate in the car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I will go over the car again without adding any more detergent to remove the remaining foam.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The background for today's video is an area circle to give an idea of size for calibration.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The area circle can be used to calibrate distances when traveling around Boulder or other places in the world.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The area circle starts at 500 meters and then doubles in size (1000 meters, 2000 meters, etc.).

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to label each size of the area circle, such as 20 plumber across being a kingdom.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think later I will make a video showing the same size comparisons from different places in the world.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Creating the area circle took eight minutes, so the video will also be eight minutes long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I'm trying to do too many things at the same time and it's overwhelming.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to start running and biking, but I need to get other things in order first.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to create a webpage for my biking project, but the one I made disappeared.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought I had made 300 pages for the biking project, but they disappeared.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to rebuild the biking project webpage and finish other unfinished pages on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My website is in disarray, like 'Syria, Mom doubts Syria,' and needs to be fixed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm currently working on the Italy section of my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Tomorrow I will go to my mom's house again to continue shampooing the car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to listen to Roman agrarian law while working tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really high right now.
